analysis.short_title: Global Feature Importance for Frontotemporal Class
analysis.markdown:
This horizontal bar chart displays the global feature importance for the 'Frontotemporal' class, measured by the mean absolute SHAP value. The features are listed on the y-axis, and the corresponding SHAP values are represented by the length of the red bars and numerical labels at the end of each bar.

| Feature | Mean(|SHAP value|) |
| :--- | :--- |
| Beta | +0.26 |
| Zaeta | +0.2 |
| Delta | +0.01 |
| Alpha | +0.01 |
| Theta | +0.01 |
| Gamma | +0 |

The x-axis represents the 'mean(|SHAP value|)' ranging from 0.00 to 0.25+.
visible_text: Global Feature Importance for Class: Frontotemporal
